AllocationAttributes.description: Details of the cross-region connection associated with the bandwidth package.

AllocateTime.description: Time when the bandwidth package was associated with the cross-region connection.

Bandwidth.description: Bandwidth peak of the cross-region connection, in Mbps.

LocalRegionId.description: Region ID of the local transit router instance in the cross-region connection.

PeerRegionId.description: Region ID of the peer transit router instance in the cross-region connection.

AccountId.description: Account ID to which the bandwidth package belongs.

Allocations.description: Details of the cross-region connection associated with the bandwidth package.

Bandwidth.description: Bandwidth peak of the transit router bandwidth package, in Mbps.

BillingStatus.description: Billing status of the transit router bandwidth package. 0: creating. 1: running. 3: unsubscribed. 4: expired and stopped. 5: expired and recycled. 8: unsubscribed and stopped.

BillingType.description: Billing method of the transit router bandwidth package. 1: subscription (yearly/monthly).

BusinessStatus.description: Business status of the transit router bandwidth package. Normal: normal. FinancialLocked: frozen.

CreationTime.description: Creation time of the transit router bandwidth package.

DeletedTime.description: Deletion time of the transit router bandwidth package.

Description.description: Description of the transit router bandwidth package.

ExpiredTime.description: Expiration time of the transit router bandwidth package.

LineOperator.description: Carrier for cross-border bandwidth package. ChinaUnicom: China Unicom ChinaTelecom: China Telecom

LocalGeographicRegionSetId.description: Local geographic region ID for transit router bandwidth package interconnection. China: Chinese mainland Asia: Asia-Pacific

PeerGeographicRegionSetId.description: Peer geographic region ID for transit router bandwidth package interconnection. China: Chinese mainland. Asia: Asia-Pacific.

Period.description: Purchase duration of the transit router bandwidth package.

PeriodUnit.description: Billing cycle of the transit router bandwidth package. Month: billed monthly. Year: billed yearly.

ProjectName.description: Name of the project to which the transit router bandwidth package belongs.

ReclaimTime.description: Recycle time after the transit router bandwidth package expires. Returned when BillingType is 1.

RemainRenewTimes.description: Number of auto-renewals. Value can be -1 or 1–100. Default is -1, which means unlimited auto-renewals.

RemainingBandwidth.description: Remaining unallocated bandwidth of the transit router bandwidth package, in Mbps.

RenewPeriod.description: Duration of each auto-renewal, in months.

RenewType.description: Renewal type for transit router bandwidth package. Manual: Manual renewal Auto: Automatic renewal NoRenew: Do not renew

Status.description: Status of the transit router bandwidth package. Creating: creating. Deleting: deleting. Pending: configuring. Available: available.

Tags.description: Tag information of the transit router bandwidth package.

TransitRouterBandwidthPackageName.description: Name of the transit router bandwidth package.

UpdateTime.description: Last operation time of the transit router bandwidth package.
